text.title: Multi-Touch Attribution Modeling Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: last-click statistically equivalent at short funnel

branch.when: channels_active >= 2 AND pipeline_days >= 7 AND warehouse_present == false

conclusion.verdict: build warehouse + GA4 export pipeline first; attribution layer needs anchor

branch.when: channels_active >= 2 AND pipeline_days >= 7 AND warehouse_present == true AND dark_social_share > 0.20

conclusion.verdict: implement dark-social tracking (UTM surveys + source question) before model build

branch.when: channels_active >= 2 AND pipeline_days >= 7 AND warehouse_present == true AND dark_social_share <= 0.20

conclusion.verdict: build four-model spec + monthly reconciliation + variance report

example.trace: channels_active >= 2 AND pipeline_days >= 7 AND warehouse_present == true AND dark_social_share <= 0.20 → conclusion ref="four-model-variants" verdict="build four-model spec + monthly reconciliation + variance report"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
